content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — push entitlement (App/DealAlerts.entitlements: aps-environment) combined with hourly repeating promo notifications (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:11, repeats every 3600s) and metadata promising "EVERY HOUR … unlimited notifications" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt) may trigger review questions about push/notification spam.
Pierre: Apple's 4.5 rules forbid using notifications for unsolicited marketing spam, and both the code and the App Store description explicitly advertise hourly, unlimited promotional alerts that aren't user-initiated or configurable. A reviewer reading the description alone could reject the app for promising notification abuse. Consider making deal alerts opt-in per category/frequency, using marketing-push consent per 4.5.4 conventions, and softening the "every hour, unlimited" wording in the metadata.
